## Description
Provide a summary of the changes and the rationale behind them. Reference any related issues.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / performance optimization

## Verification & Validation Gates
Verify that this PR passes the SADS quality gates:
- [ ] Physics Verification (energy/momentum conservation holds)
- [ ] Mathematical Verification (no numerical divergence or precision loss)
- [ ] Engineering Validation (minimum 20% power margin, safety margins satisfied)
- [ ] Simulation Testing (simulation runs successfully, deorbit compliance verified)
- [ ] Unit & Integration Tests (all pytest suites pass)
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or linting errors
